creator: mrossi@swin.edu.au
text:
Another follow-up:

Bug still persists on FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT (r214000), using 
virtualbox-ose-3.2.10, and is solved by the patch by Anthony Jenkins (a 
big thank you from my part, as this was bugging me since quite a while, 
and I couldn't find the cause).

Maybe it's time to include that patch in the ports tree?

Mat
